docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHAKRAVARTHY, KAMESH BABU AS TO DEFENDANT FASTRAK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-05-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-25-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED JUN-06-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FASTRAK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FASTRAK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MANUEL ESPIRITU--BATA FASTRAK PROGRAM COORDINATOR. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAKRAVARTHY, KAMESH BABU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FASTRAK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
